RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0002 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Maria Ito Date of Birth: 01/11/1977 SSN (tokenized): TKN-306592 Annual Income: $61,000 Employer: Initech Loan Amount: $20,000 Term (months): 72 Branch: Dublin Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN82798AL Hyundai F-150 2025 ICE CPO 45,000 Authorized Signature: Maria Ito
